'''鈭歸-p-w''' ('''kawapaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pebbledash|pebbledash]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-p-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pebbledash|pebbledash]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-p-w
|-
! Lemma
| kawapaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwapaw|thiwapaw]] || [[word:jiwapaw|jiwapaw]] || [[word:shiwapaw|shiwapaw]] || [[word:kiwapaw|kiwapaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwapaw|thuthuwapaw]] || [[word:jujuwapaw|jujuwapaw]] || [[word:shushuwapaw|shushuwapaw]] || [[word:kukuwapaw|kukuwapaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwapaw|thuwapaw]] || [[word:juwapaw|juwapaw]] || [[word:shuwapaw|shuwapaw]] || [[word:kuwapaw|kuwapaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwapaw|thuwapaw]] || [[word:juwapaw|juwapaw]] || [[word:shuwapaw|shuwapaw]] || [[word:kuwapaw|kuwapaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewapaw|thewapaw]] || [[word:jewapaw|jewapaw]] || [[word:shewapaw|shewapaw]] || [[word:kewapaw|kewapaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowapaw|thothowapaw]] || [[word:jojowapaw|jojowapaw]] || [[word:shoshowapaw|shoshowapaw]] || [[word:kokowapaw|kokowapaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowapaw|thowapaw]] || [[word:jowapaw|jowapaw]] || [[word:showapaw|showapaw]] || [[word:kowapaw|kowapaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowapaw|thowapaw]] || [[word:jowapaw|jowapaw]] || [[word:showapaw|showapaw]] || [[word:kowapaw|kowapaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wapaw|wapaw]] || [[word:wapaw|wapaw]] || [[word:wapaw|wapaw]] || [[word:wapaw|wapaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wapaw|wapaw]] || [[word:wapaw|wapaw]] || [[word:wapaw|wapaw]] || [[word:wapaw|wapaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wapaw|wapaw]] || [[word:wapaw|wapaw]] || [[word:wapaw|wapaw]] || [[word:wapaw|wapaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wapaw|wapaw]] || [[word:wapaw|wapaw]] || [[word:wapaw|wapaw]] || [[word:wapaw|wapaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙wapaw|th忙wapaw]] || [[word:j忙wapaw|j忙wapaw]] || [[word:sh忙wapaw|sh忙wapaw]] || [[word:k忙wapaw|k忙wapaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawapaw|thathawapaw]] || [[word:jajawapaw|jajawapaw]] || [[word:shashawapaw|shashawapaw]] || [[word:kakawapaw|kakawapaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawapaw|thawapaw]] || [[word:jawapaw|jawapaw]] || [[word:shawapaw|shawapaw]] || [[word:kawapaw|kawapaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawapaw|thawapaw]] || [[word:jawapaw|jawapaw]] || [[word:shawapaw|shawapaw]] || [[word:kawapaw|kawapaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawapaw|shawapaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawapaw|goshawapaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawapaw|gokishawapaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawapawn眉|shawapawn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawapawnkn眉|goshawapawnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawapawn眉|gokishawapawn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawapawsh毛|shawapawsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawapawnksh毛|goshawapawnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawapawsh毛|gokishawapawsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawapawro|shawapawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawapawnkro|goshawapawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawapawro|gokishawapawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawapawmu|shawapawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawapawnkmu|goshawapawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawapawmu|gokishawapawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawapawsher|shawapawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawapawnksher|goshawapawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawapawsher|gokishawapawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawapawng|shawapawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawapawnkng|goshawapawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawapawng|gokishawapawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawapawya|shawapawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawapawnkya|goshawapawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawapawya|gokishawapawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawapawyam|shawapawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawapawnkyam|goshawapawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawapawyam|gokishawapawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawapawn眉sh毛|shawapawn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawapawnkn眉sh毛|goshawapawnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawapawn眉sh毛|gokishawapawn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawapawn眉ro|shawapawn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawapawnkn眉ro|goshawapawnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawapawn眉ro|gokishawapawn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawapawn眉mu|shawapawn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawapawnkn眉mu|goshawapawnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawapawn眉mu|gokishawapawn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawapawsh毛n眉|shawapawsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawapawnksh毛n眉|goshawapawnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawapawsh毛n眉|gokishawapawsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawapawsh毛ro|shawapawsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawapawnksh毛ro|goshawapawnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawapawsh毛ro|gokishawapawsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawapawsh毛mu|shawapawsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawapawnksh毛mu|goshawapawnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawapawsh毛mu|gokishawapawsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawapawron眉|shawapawron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawapawnkron眉|goshawapawnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawapawron眉|gokishawapawron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawapawrosh毛|shawapawrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawapawnkrosh毛|goshawapawnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawapawrosh毛|gokishawapawrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawapawromu|shawapawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawapawnkromu|goshawapawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawapawromu|gokishawapawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawapawmun眉|shawapawmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawapawnkmun眉|goshawapawnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawapawmun眉|gokishawapawmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawapawmush毛|shawapawmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawapawnkmush毛|goshawapawnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawapawmush毛|gokishawapawmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawapawmuro|shawapawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawapawnkmuro|goshawapawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawapawmuro|gokishawapawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
